property.name: The Nest on Tennyson
property.location: Tennyson Street, Petone, Lower Hutt 5012, Wellington, New Zealand
property.description: A warm, modern 3-bedroom family retreat on a quiet tree-lined street in Petone. Walk to Jackson Street cafes, Petone Beach, and catch the train to Wellington CBD.

checkin.method: Self check-in via Yale smart lock keypad on the front door
checkin.instructions: Enter your personal access code on the Yale keypad at the front door and press the check button. The door will unlock automatically.

checkout.instructions: Please start the dishwasher, take out any rubbish, and close the door behind you. No need to strip the beds.

cancellation.fullRefund: Cancel 30+ days before check-in for a full refund
cancellation.partialRefund: Cancel 7-30 days before check-in for a 50% refund
cancellation.noRefund: No refund for cancellations less than 7 days before check-in

amenities.kitchen: Full kitchen with gas range, oven, dishwasher, fridge-freezer, microwave, Nespresso coffee machine, kettle, toaster, pots, pans, utensils, oil, salt, pepper, and spices
amenities.livingRoom: Smart TV with Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, Bluetooth speaker, board games, books, heat pump
amenities.bedrooms: Main: queen bed, Second: queen bed, Kids room: bunk beds (single over single). All linen, pillows, towels provided. Extra blankets in wardrobes.
amenities.bathrooms: Two full bathrooms with showers, shampoo, conditioner, body wash, hair dryer
amenities.laundry: Washing machine, dryer, detergent, pegs, drying rack, iron and ironing board
amenities.outdoor: Private fenced garden (safe for kids), outdoor dining table, BBQ
amenities.parking: Free off-street parking in the driveway (1 car) plus unlimited free street parking
amenities.heating: Heat pump in the living area

houseRules: No smoking inside (outdoor area is fine)
No parties or events — residential neighbourhood
Pets considered on a case-by-case basis — please ask first
Start the dishwasher and take out rubbish before checkout

neighbourhood.area: Petone is a charming coastal village with amazing cafes, restaurants, boutique shops, and easy access to Wellington city

coffee.name: Comes & Goes
coffee.note: Local favourite for coffee and brunch

coffee.name: Pickle & Pie
coffee.note: Outstanding pies and pastries on Jackson Street

dinner.name: Boneface Brewing
dinner.note: Craft beer taproom with food, family friendly

dinner.name: Salty Pidgin
dinner.note: Petone's best restaurant, modern NZ cuisine

activities.name: Petone Beach & Esplanade
activities.note: Waterfront walk, sunset views of Wellington

transport.fromAirport: Wellington Airport is about 20-25 minutes by car. Uber/taxi available. No direct public transport — take a taxi to Wellington Station then train to Petone.
transport.train: Petone Station is a 10-minute walk. Trains to Wellington CBD take about 15 minutes and run frequently.
transport.driving: Free parking at the property. Petone is well connected to SH2 for exploring the wider Wellington region.

emergency.hospital: Hutt Hospital A&E — 04 566 6999, Pilmuir Street, Lower Hutt (10 min drive)

faq.q: Is the property suitable for children?
faq.a: Absolutely! There's a dedicated kids' bedroom with bunk beds, a secure fenced garden, and Petone Beach and playgrounds are nearby.
Pets are considered on a case-by-case basis. Please message James before booking to discuss.

faq.q: Is there early check-in or late checkout?
faq.a: Early check-in and late checkout may be available depending on bookings. Please ask James and he'll do his best to accommodate.
Everything — cleaning fee, WiFi, linen, towels, kitchen basics, coffee, tea, and parking are all included in the nightly rate.

faq.q: How do I get to Wellington from the property?
faq.a: The easiest way is the train from Petone Station (10 min walk). Trains to Wellington CBD take about 15 minutes and run frequently.
Yes, there's a BBQ in the private garden area.
The Smart TV has Netflix, Disney+, and Apple TV pre-loaded.
The property has some steps at the entrance so it's not fully wheelchair accessible. Please contact James to discuss your specific needs.
Yes — there's a washing machine, dryer, and laundry detergent provided.
The WiFi details are shared after booking in your guest guide. Network: 'The Nest', Password: 'nestontennyson'.
